name: Fettuccine with Creamy Squash Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Celery, thinly sliced, cut on the diagonal
1/2 cup Carrots, peeled and thinly sliced -- cut on the diagonal
6 cups Cooked pasta (whole wheat fettuccine is especially good)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the steamed squash with the soy milk and arrowroot or cornstarch until smooth. Set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a saucepan. Saute celery, carrots, onions, and seasonings for about 5 minutes.
3. Add the squash mixture and continue cooking, stirring constantly until the sauce has thickened.
4. Spoon the sauce over the cooked pasta.
Variation: Substitute 1 1/2 cups broccoli florets for the celery and 1 cup quartered mushrooms for the carrots. Or you may wish to use these vegetables in addition to the celery and carrots.
